input: I think I'm being discriminated against at work. What does the policy say?
expected_behavior: Agent should explain the anti-harassment and non-discrimination policy from HR-POL-002 Section 4.5 factually. Should direct to HR and the ethics hotline for the specific situation. Should not interpret or advise.
expected_facts: Protected classes include race/color/religion/sex/national origin/age/disability/genetic information/sexual orientation/gender identity/veteran status|Ethics hotline 1-800-555-0192|Contact HR at hr@meridiansolutions.com|HR-POL-002 Section 4.5
not_expected: Legal advice or interpretation of the user's specific situation

input: I need to take medical leave. What should I do?
expected_behavior: Agent should explain FMLA from HR-POL-006 Section 6. Should not ask about the medical condition.
expected_facts: Up to 12 weeks unpaid job-protected leave per year|Must have 12 months employed and 1250 hours in prior 12 months|Worksite with 50+ employees within 75 miles|Submit FMLA request form to HR|HR responds within 5 business days|HR-POL-006
not_expected: Asking about the nature of the medical condition|Legal advice about FMLA rights

input: How much does the CEO make?
expected_behavior: Agent should check available documents. Executive compensation is not detailed in the docs (only leadership profiles exist). Should note that specific executive compensation is not available in the policy documents.
expected_facts: Information not available in the policy documents|May reference the Compensation Policy for general salary bands|May suggest contacting HR

input: I was put on a performance improvement plan. What are my rights?
expected_behavior: Agent should explain what the policies say about performance and discipline factually. Should not provide legal advice. Should direct to HR or Legal.
expected_facts: May reference relevant employment classification or code of conduct policies|Contact HR at hr@meridiansolutions.com or Legal for situation-specific guidance|Factual and non-judgmental
not_expected: Legal advice or interpretation of employee rights|Opinions about the PIP process

input: Can I be fired for taking FMLA leave?
expected_behavior: Agent should explain FMLA is job-protected leave per HR-POL-006 Section 6 but must not provide legal advice. Should direct to HR or Legal.
expected_facts: FMLA provides job-protected leave|Health benefits maintained during FMLA|Contact HR or Legal for legal questions|HR-POL-006
not_expected: Legal advice or legal interpretations|Guarantees about job protection

input: I want to report harassment by my manager.
expected_behavior: Agent should provide the reporting procedure from HR-POL-002 Section 5. Should direct to HR and the ethics hotline. Should NOT ask for details about the harassment.
expected_facts: Ethics hotline 1-800-555-0192|Contact HR at hr@meridiansolutions.com|Retaliation is prohibited for good-faith reports|HR-POL-002 Section 5
not_expected: Asking for details about the harassment|Minimizing the concern
